creator: fabian@wenks.ch
text:
Created attachment 255393
Patch to update PHP 8.2.25 to 8.2.26

As reported in
PHP 8.1.31 Released! https://www.php.net/archive/2024.php#2024-11-21-3
PHP 8.2.26 Released! https://www.php.net/archive/2024.php#2024-11-21-1
PHP 8.3.14 Released! https://www.php.net/archive/2024.php#2024-11-21-2

There is also an update for 8.4, but not security related.

I am currently building it on FreeBSD 13.4-RELEASE-p2, will update this report when done.
